localization.name: Infect Reality
localization.description:
300% damage to 2 random enemies. This attack cannot be redirected by Guardians, and will ignore the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. This attack can hit targets that have the Stealth Status Effect or a passive effect that ignores multiple target attacks.

Consumes 1 charge on the user and unlocks at random either Mind Piercer or No One Escapes. This skill becomes locked after use until the user uses another active skill. This skill is locked if the user has no Charges.

localization.name: Mind Piercer
localization.description: 600% damage to 1 random enemy. This attack cannot be redirected by Guardians. This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Infect Reality. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: No One Escapes
localization.description: 300% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores the Stealth Status Effect. Sets both enemy and ally Spirit to 5. This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Infect Reality. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Reset Reality
localization.description: The user has all Sleep immunities, Sleep Wards and Stealth Shields removed. Then, the user is healed for 5% of max HP, granted 3 Charges, and Sleep for 100TU, even if they have already slept. A random enemy is also granted Sleep for 200TU, even if they have already slept. The next time the user is awake at the end of a turn, they will be healed for 5% of max HP, and have their current TU reduced by 100. Usable only if the user has no Charges stored.
localization.selected:
Sleeps User and Random Enemy
(Will overwrite other status effects)

localization.name: Cult of Madness
localization.description:
Enemies damaged by an attack from this unit are Mega Poisoned for 200TU. Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

If this unit is on 1HP at the end of a turn, it is healed for 5% max HP and Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed) at the end of the turn.

This unit gains 3 charges. Triggered both at the very start of the battle if this unit is on the battlefield, and when this unit enters the battlefield from reinforcements.

If this unit would be defeated while it has any charges, this unit will consume 1 charge to survive with 1HP remaining instead. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store up to 3 charges.

localization.name: The Great One
localization.description:
Whenever an enemy enters the battlefield from reinforcements, this unit has a 100% chance to immediately have its TU reduced to 0, be Purified, and be granted Sleep Immunity until the end of the turn.

The first time this unit is damaged by an attack while this unit has no Charges, and is below 10% of max HP, it will enter Warped Reality for 200TU. While in Warped Reality, this unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield, cannot be defeated by damage, has 90% damage reduction from attacks and is a Guardian.

Whenever this unit gets the turn in Warped Reality, it will lose the turn and Mega Poison all non-sleeping enemies for 200TU. Then if there is more than 1 enemy on the battlefield and no enemy is Hypnotized, this unit will hypnotize 1 random enemy on the battlefield. This unit cannot be Hypnotized while in Warped Reality. When Warped Reality ends, this unit will be sacrificed.

While this unit is a Guardian, for any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage. A Hypnotized enemy will use its next turn to grant the turn to and Purify the hypnotizer (the turn will be lost as if it were sleeping), and then the hypnosis will end. Hypnosis is not a status effect and cannot be removed by Purify skills, but will be canceled if the hypnotizer is defeated or leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Immovable
localization.description: This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

localization.name: Stun Immunity
localization.description: This unit is not affected by stun effects.
